name: layouting-el
description: Aplikasi dokumentasi berbasis el.js, layout.js, dan Markdown

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check services/doc-service.js && node --check services/doc-image-service.js && node --check services/doc-renderer.js
scripts.dev:db-up-sudo: sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
scripts.dev:db-reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
scripts.dev:db-reset-sudo: sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
scripts.dev:setup: npm run dev:db-up && cp .env.dev .env.local && echo 'Dev environment ready! Run npm run dev'
scripts.dev:setup-sudo: npm run dev:db-up-sudo && cp .env.dev .env.local && echo 'Dev environment ready! Run npm run dev'
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:db-up && sleep 3 && nodemon server.js
scripts.dev:full-sudo: npm run dev:db-up-sudo && sleep 3 && nodemon server.js
